---
title: "H1"
author: "Arturo Bertero"
date: "2026-03-02"
output: html_document
---

# Input

```{r}
#Libraries
library(pacman)
p_load(lavaan, rio, tidyverse, psych, here, stargazer, summarytools, visdat,
       EGAnet, qgraph, ggplot2, haven, janitor, readxl, labelled, reshape2,
       openxlsx, mgm, bootnet, conflicted, magick, cocron, lme4, broom.mixed, 
       patchwork, huge, grid)

#Options
rm(list = ls())
options(scipen = 999)
#conflicts
conflicts_prefer(dplyr::filter)
conflicts_prefer(dplyr::select)

# Data
master_datasets <- readRDS(here("Input", "Secondary", "master_datasets.rds"))
```

# Processing

## Preparation

```{r}
# Initialize an empty list for H2
H2_matrices <- list()

# Loop through the master list to extract and split data 
for (study_name in names(master_datasets)) {
  
  df <- master_datasets[[study_name]]
  
  # For H2 we keep only country, the CB sum-score, and individual cm_ items
  df_clean <- df %>%
    select(country, CB, starts_with("cm_")) %>%
    na.omit()
  
  # Split by country
  split_df <- split(df_clean[, setdiff(names(df_clean), "country")], df_clean$country)
  
  # Convert to matrices, apply nonparanormal transformation, and assign names
  for (country_name in names(split_df)) {
    list_name <- paste0(study_name, "_", country_name)
    
    # 1. Convert to raw matrix
    raw_matrix <- as.matrix(split_df[[country_name]])
    
    # 2. Apply the nonparanormal transformation directly
    # This relaxes Gaussian assumptions for the skewed conspiracy items
    H2_matrices[[list_name]] <- huge.npn(raw_matrix, verbose = FALSE)
  }
}
```

## Network estimation and plotting

```{r}
# Maintain color consistency: Purple for CM items, Green for CB Index
Totalgroup_cols_H2 <- c("#966FD6", "#006B3C") 

for (name in names(H2_matrices)) {
  
  data_matrix <- H2_matrices[[name]]
  n_vars <- ncol(data_matrix)
  node_names <- colnames(data_matrix)
  
  # Generate type and level (all Gaussian after huge.npn)
  type_vec <- rep("g", n_vars)
  level_vec <- rep(1, n_vars)
  
  # Estimation using MGM
  mgm_result <- mgm(
    data_matrix, type = type_vec, level = level_vec,
    lambdaSel = "CV", ruleReg = "OR", verbose = FALSE, pbar = FALSE
  )
  
  # Predictability (R2 pie charts)
  pred_result <- predict(object = mgm_result, data = data_matrix, errorCon = 'R2')
  
  # Assign groups for H2: CM items vs. the single CB sum-score
  groups_H2 <- list(
    "CM items" = which(grepl("^cm_", node_names)),
    "CB Index" = which(node_names == "CB")
  )
  
  # Output path for high-res PNG
  output_path <- here("Output", "H2", "Country_networks", paste0(name, ".png"))

  # Open PNG device (High Resolution)
  png(output_path, width = 4.15, height = 5.85, units = "in", res = 600)

  # Generate the qgraph plot 
  qgraph(
    mgm_result$pairwise$wadj, 
    layout = "spring", 
    labels = node_names,
    groups = groups_H2,   
    color = Totalgroup_cols_H2, 
    legend = FALSE,
    title = name, 
    edge.color = mgm_result$pairwise$edgecolor, # Standard MGM edge colors
    vTrans = 180, 
    borders = TRUE, 
    vsize = 10, 
    esize = 7, 
    label.cex = 0.50,
    label.scale = FALSE, 
    pie = pred_result$errors[,2], 
    pieColor = rep('#FFFF00', n_vars)
  )

  dev.off()
}
```

```{r}
# Directories (Updated to H2)
input_dir <- here("Output", "H2", "Country_networks")
output_dir <- here("Output", "H2", "Composite_Figures")
dir.create(output_dir, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

# Fetch all PNGs 
all_pngs <- list.files(input_dir, pattern = "\\.png$", full.names = TRUE)

# --- STUDY 1: 8 Countries ---
study1_files <- all_pngs[grepl("Study1", all_pngs)]
if (length(study1_files) == 8) {
  
  imgs_1a <- lapply(study1_files[1:4], image_read)
  imgs_1b <- lapply(study1_files[5:8], image_read)
  
  comp_1a <- image_montage(image_join(imgs_1a), tile = "2x2", geometry = "+50+50")
  comp_1b <- image_montage(image_join(imgs_1b), tile = "2x2", geometry = "+50+50")
  
  # Save (Updated names to H2)
  image_write(comp_1a, path = here(output_dir, "H2_Study1_Composite_A.png"), format = "png")
  image_write(comp_1b, path = here(output_dir, "H2_Study1_Composite_B.png"), format = "png")
}

# --- STUDY 2: 1 Country ---
study2_files <- all_pngs[grepl("Study2", all_pngs)]
if (length(study2_files) == 1) {
  file.copy(from = study2_files[1], to = here(output_dir, "H2_Study2_Composite.png"), overwrite = TRUE)
}

# --- STUDY 3 (CMQ): 8 Countries ---
study3_cmq_files <- all_pngs[grepl("Study3_CMQ", all_pngs)]
if (length(study3_cmq_files) == 8) {
  
  imgs_3a_cmq <- lapply(study3_cmq_files[1:4], image_read)
  imgs_3b_cmq <- lapply(study3_cmq_files[5:8], image_read)
  
  comp_3a_cmq <- image_montage(image_join(imgs_3a_cmq), tile = "2x2", geometry = "+50+50")
  comp_3b_cmq <- image_montage(image_join(imgs_3b_cmq), tile = "2x2", geometry = "+50+50")
  
  # Save (Updated names to H2)
  image_write(comp_3a_cmq, path = here(output_dir, "H2_Study3_CMQ_Composite_A.png"), format = "png")
  image_write(comp_3b_cmq, path = here(output_dir, "H2_Study3_CMQ_Composite_B.png"), format = "png")
}
```


## Bootstrapping

```{r}
# # Set seed for exact reproducibility
# set.seed(123)
# 
# # Initialize empty list
# boot_results_H2 <- list()
# 
# # Loop across all H2 matrices dynamically
# for (name in names(H2_matrices)) {
#   cat("Bootstrapping", name, "...\n")
#   
#   country_matrix <- H2_matrices[[name]]
#   
#   # Simplified bootnet call: 
#   # It uses mgm defaults (lambdaSel = "CV", ruleReg = "OR") automatically.
#   boot_result <- bootnet(
#     country_matrix,
#     nBoots = 1000,
#     nCores = 16, 
#     default = "mgm",
#     statistics = "strength"
#   )
#     
#   boot_results_H2[[name]] <- boot_result
# }
# 
# # Save locally to H2 specific master file
# saveRDS(boot_results_H2, here("Input", "Secondary", "boot_H2_master.rds"))

# Load to save time
boot_results_H2 <- readRDS(here("Input", "Secondary", "boot_H2_master.rds"))
```

## Violins

```{r}
# Empty list 
boot_dataframes <- list()

# reshape based on the specific node count of each dataset
for (name in names(boot_results_H2)) {
  
  values <- boot_results_H2[[name]][["bootTable"]][["value"]]
  
  # Fetch node names and counts from the original matrices
  node_names <- colnames(H2_matrices[[name]])
  n_nodes <- length(node_names)
  
  # Reshape vector into a matrix
  values_matrix <- matrix(values, ncol = n_nodes, byrow = TRUE)
  
  # Convert to df
  values_dataframe <- as.data.frame(values_matrix)
  colnames(values_dataframe) <- node_names
  
  boot_dataframes[[name]] <- values_dataframe
}

# Melt dfs individually first, then bind 
long_boot_list <- lapply(names(boot_dataframes), function(name) {
  df <- boot_dataframes[[name]]
  df$Dataset <- name 
  reshape2::melt(df, id.vars = "Dataset", variable.name = "Node", value.name = "Centrality")
})

# Combine all the long-format dfs
long_boot_data <- do.call(rbind, long_boot_list)

# Data Cleaning (Removed GCB 14-item references)
long_boot_data <- long_boot_data %>%
  mutate(
    CountryRaw = Dataset %>%
      str_remove("Study1_SUSPECTS_") %>%
      str_remove("Study2_ACTS_") %>%
      str_remove("Study3_CMQ_"), # Purged Study3_GCB_
    
    CountryName = case_when(
      CountryRaw == "DEU" ~ "Germany",
      CountryRaw == "ESP" ~ "Spain",
      CountryRaw == "FRA" ~ "France",
      CountryRaw == "GBR" ~ "United Kingdom",
      CountryRaw == "ITA" ~ "Italy",
      CountryRaw == "POL" ~ "Poland",
      CountryRaw == "SWE" ~ "Sweden",
      CountryRaw %in% c("USA", "USA_ACTS") ~ "United States",
      TRUE ~ CountryRaw 
    ),
    
    ScaleAcronym = case_when(
      grepl("Study1", Dataset) ~ "GCB5",
      grepl("Study2", Dataset) ~ "ACTS",
      grepl("Study3_CMQ", Dataset) ~ "CMQ" # Purged Study3_GCB
    ),
    
    FacetTitle = paste0(CountryName, " - ", ScaleAcronym)
  )

# Calculate 95% bootstrapped CIs 
ci_data <- long_boot_data %>%
  group_by(FacetTitle, Node) %>%
  summarise(
    lower = quantile(Centrality, probs = 0.025),
    upper = quantile(Centrality, probs = 0.975),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

# Colors: CB is now purple (index), cm_ items are green
violin_colors <- ifelse(unique(long_boot_data$Node) == "CB", "#966FD6", "#006B3C")
names(violin_colors) <- unique(long_boot_data$Node)

# Define the 3 plot groups (GCB removed)
plot_groups <- list(
  "Study1"     = list(prefix = "Study1_",      y_lim = NULL),
  "Study2"     = list(prefix = "Study2_",      y_lim = NULL),
  "Study3_CMQ" = list(prefix = "Study3_CMQ_",  y_lim = NULL)
)

# Generate and save plots
for (group_name in names(plot_groups)) {
  
  # Extract group settings
  prefix <- plot_groups[[group_name]]$prefix
  y_lim <- plot_groups[[group_name]]$y_lim
  
  # Filter data 
  group_long_data <- long_boot_data %>% filter(grepl(paste0("^", prefix), Dataset))
  group_ci_data <- ci_data %>% filter(FacetTitle %in% unique(group_long_data$FacetTitle))
  
  # The plot
  group_plot <- ggplot(group_long_data, aes(x = Node, y = Centrality, fill = Node)) +
    geom_violin(alpha = 0.8) +
    geom_errorbar(data = group_ci_data, aes(x = Node, ymin = lower, ymax = upper), 
                  width = 0.2, color = "black", inherit.aes = FALSE) +
    scale_fill_manual(values = violin_colors) +
    facet_wrap(~ FacetTitle, scales = "free_x", ncol = 2) + 
    labs(
      title = paste("H2 Bootstrapped Centrality:", group_name),
      x = "Node",
      y = "Centrality"
    ) +
    theme(
      legend.position = "none",
      axis.title.y = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold"),
      axis.title.x = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold"),
      plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = 18, face = "bold"),
      axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1)
    )
  
  # Apply limits if defined
  if (!is.null(y_lim)) {
    group_plot <- group_plot + scale_y_continuous(limits = y_lim)
  }
  
  # Dynamic height
  n_panels <- length(unique(group_long_data$FacetTitle))
  plot_height <- max(6, ceiling(n_panels / 2) * 3)
  
  # Save as PNG with 600 DPI
  output_filename <- here("Output", "H2", paste0("H2_Centrality_", group_name, ".png"))
  ggsave(output_filename, plot = group_plot, device = "png", 
         width = 10, height = plot_height, units = "in", dpi = 600)
}
```

## Final visualization for the paper

```{r}
# manage data again
H1_matrices <- list()
H2_matrices <- list()

for (study_name in names(master_datasets)) {
  df <- master_datasets[[study_name]]
  
  # Re-build H1 matrices 
  df_h1 <- df %>% select(country, CM, starts_with("cb_")) %>% na.omit()
  split_h1 <- split(df_h1[, setdiff(names(df_h1), "country")], df_h1$country)
  for (cn in names(split_h1)) {
    H1_matrices[[paste0(study_name, "_", cn)]] <- huge.npn(as.matrix(split_h1[[cn]]), verbose = FALSE)
  }
  
  # Re-build H2 matrices 
  df_h2 <- df %>% select(country, CB, starts_with("cm_")) %>% na.omit()
  split_h2 <- split(df_h2[, setdiff(names(df_h2), "country")], df_h2$country)
  for (cn in names(split_h2)) {
    H2_matrices[[paste0(study_name, "_", cn)]] <- huge.npn(as.matrix(split_h2[[cn]]), verbose = FALSE)
  }
}

# load h1 results
boot_results_H1 <- readRDS(here("Input", "Secondary", "boot_H1_master.rds"))


# process boots again
process_boots <- function(boot_list, matrix_list, hypo_label) {
  lapply(names(boot_list), function(name) {
    values <- boot_list[[name]][["bootTable"]][["value"]]
    node_names <- colnames(matrix_list[[name]])
    n_nodes <- length(node_names)
    df <- as.data.frame(matrix(values, ncol = n_nodes, byrow = TRUE))
    colnames(df) <- node_names
    df$Dataset <- name
    df$Hypothesis <- hypo_label
    melt(df, id.vars = c("Dataset", "Hypothesis"), variable.name = "Node", value.name = "Centrality")
  }) %>% bind_rows()
}

long_h1 <- process_boots(boot_results_H1, H1_matrices, "H1")
long_h2 <- process_boots(boot_results_H2, H2_matrices, "H2")
all_long_data <- bind_rows(long_h1, long_h2)

# Labeling 
all_long_data <- all_long_data %>%
  mutate(
    CountryRaw = str_remove_all(Dataset, "Study1_SUSPECTS_|Study2_ACTS_|Study3_CMQ_"),
    CountryName = case_when(
      CountryRaw == "DEU" ~ "Germany",
      CountryRaw == "ESP" ~ "Spain",
      CountryRaw == "FRA" ~ "France",
      CountryRaw == "GBR" ~ "United Kingdom",
      CountryRaw == "ITA" ~ "Italy",
      CountryRaw == "POL" ~ "Poland",
      CountryRaw == "SWE" ~ "Sweden",
      CountryRaw %in% c("USA", "USA_ACTS") ~ "United States",
      TRUE ~ CountryRaw
    ),
    Scale = case_when(
      grepl("Study1", Dataset) ~ "GCB5",
      grepl("Study2", Dataset) ~ "ACTS",
      grepl("Study3_CMQ", Dataset) ~ "CMQ"
    )
  )

all_ci_data <- all_long_data %>%
  group_by(CountryName, Scale, Node, Hypothesis) %>%
  summarise(lower = quantile(Centrality, probs = 0.025),
            upper = quantile(Centrality, probs = 0.975), .groups = "drop")
```

```{r}
#Define a global theme
theme_masterpiece <- function() {
  theme_minimal(base_size = 11, base_family = "serif") +
    theme(
      # Text elements
      text = element_text(family = "serif", color = "#1A1A1A"),
      plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 15, family = "serif", hjust = 0.5, margin = margin(b = 15)),
      plot.tag = element_text(face = "bold", size = 22, family = "serif"),
      
      # Facet Strip
      strip.background = element_rect(fill = "#EFEFEF", color = "#333333", size = 0.6),
      strip.text = element_text(face = "bold", size = 10, family = "serif", color = "#1A1A1A"),
      
      # Grid Logic
      panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
      panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
      panel.grid.major.y = element_line(color = "#D1D1D1", size = 0.4, linetype = "dotted"),
      
      # Background
      panel.background = element_rect(fill = "white", color = "#333333", size = 0.7),
      plot.background = element_rect(fill = "#F9F9F7", color = NA), 
      
      # Axis Styling
      axis.title.y = element_text(face = "bold", size = 12, margin = margin(r = 12)),
      axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, size = 8.5, color = "black", face = "bold"),
      axis.text.y = element_text(size = 9.5, color = "black"),
      axis.line = element_line(color = "#333333", size = 0.5),
      
      # Legend 
      legend.position = "none",
      plot.margin = margin(5, 5, 5, 5)
    )
}

# High-Contrast "Scientific" Colors
node_colors <- c("Index" = "#702963", "Item" = "#008080")
```

### Study 1

```{r}
# Panel A
p1_s1 <- all_long_data %>% 
  filter(Scale == "GCB5", Hypothesis == "H1") %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = Node, y = Centrality)) +
  geom_boxplot(aes(color = ifelse(Node == "CM", "Index", "Item")), 
               width = 0.4, outlier.shape = NA, fill = "white", size = 0.7, coef = 0) +
  geom_errorbar(data = filter(all_ci_data, Scale == "GCB5", Hypothesis == "H1"),
                aes(x = Node, ymin = lower, ymax = upper), 
                width = 0.15, color = "black", linewidth = 0.6, inherit.aes = FALSE) +
  facet_wrap(~ CountryName, ncol = 4) +
  scale_color_manual(values = node_colors) +
  labs(y = "Strength Centrality", tag = "A", title = "H1") +
  theme_masterpiece() +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold", hjust = 0.5, margin = margin(b = 10)))

# Panel b
p2_s1 <- all_long_data %>% 
  filter(Scale == "GCB5", Hypothesis == "H2") %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = Node, y = Centrality)) +
  geom_boxplot(aes(color = ifelse(Node == "CB", "Index", "Item")), 
               width = 0.4, outlier.shape = NA, fill = "white", size = 0.7, coef = 0) +
  geom_errorbar(data = filter(all_ci_data, Scale == "GCB5", Hypothesis == "H2"),
                aes(x = Node, ymin = lower, ymax = upper), 
                width = 0.15, color = "black", linewidth = 0.6, inherit.aes = FALSE) +
  facet_wrap(~ CountryName, ncol = 4) +
  scale_color_manual(values = node_colors) +
  labs(y = "Strength Centrality", tag = "B", title = "H2") +
  theme_masterpiece() +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold", hjust = 0.5, margin = margin(b = 10)))

# together
combined_s1 <- (p1_s1 / p2_s1) + 
  plot_layout(heights = c(1, 1)) & 
  theme(
    plot.tag = element_text(face = "bold", size = 20),
    axis.title.x = element_blank() 
  )

ggsave(
  here("Output", "Study1_Combined_Masterpiece_A4.png"), 
  plot = combined_s1, 
  width = 8.27, 
  height = 11.69, 
  units = "in", 
  dpi = 600 
)
```

### Study 2

```{r}
# A
p1_s2 <- all_long_data %>% 
  filter(Scale == "ACTS", Hypothesis == "H1") %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = Node, y = Centrality)) +
  geom_boxplot(aes(color = ifelse(Node == "CM", "Index", "Item")), 
               width = 0.3, fill = "white", size = 0.7, 
               outlier.shape = NA, coef = 0) + 
  geom_errorbar(data = filter(all_ci_data, Scale == "ACTS", Hypothesis == "H1"),
                aes(x = Node, ymin = lower, ymax = upper), 
                width = 0.1, color = "black", linewidth = 0.8, inherit.aes = FALSE) +
  facet_wrap(~ CountryName, ncol = 1) +
  scale_color_manual(values = node_colors) + 
  labs(y = "Strength Centrality", tag = "A", title = "H1") + 
  theme_masterpiece() +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 15, face = "bold", hjust = 0.5, margin = margin(b = 10)))

# B
p2_s2 <- all_long_data %>% 
  filter(Scale == "ACTS", Hypothesis == "H2") %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = Node, y = Centrality)) +
  geom_boxplot(aes(color = ifelse(Node == "CB", "Index", "Item")), 
               width = 0.3, fill = "white", size = 0.7, 
               outlier.shape = NA, coef = 0) +
  geom_errorbar(data = filter(all_ci_data, Scale == "ACTS", Hypothesis == "H2"),
                aes(x = Node, ymin = lower, ymax = upper), 
                width = 0.1, color = "black", linewidth = 0.8, inherit.aes = FALSE) +
  facet_wrap(~ CountryName, ncol = 1) +
  scale_color_manual(values = node_colors) + 
  labs(y = "Strength Centrality", tag = "B", title = "H2") + 
  theme_masterpiece() +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 15, face = "bold", hjust = 0.5, margin = margin(b = 10)))

# Together
combined_s2 <- (p1_s2 / p2_s2) + 
  plot_layout(heights = c(1, 1)) & 
  theme(
    plot.tag = element_text(face = "bold", size = 20),
    axis.title.x = element_blank() 
  )

ggsave(
  here("Output", "Study2_Combined_Masterpiece_A4.png"), 
  plot = combined_s2, 
  width = 8.27, 
  height = 11.69, 
  dpi = 600
)
```

### Study 3

```{r}
# A
p1_s3 <- all_long_data %>% 
  filter(Scale == "CMQ", Hypothesis == "H1") %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = Node, y = Centrality)) +
  geom_boxplot(aes(color = ifelse(Node == "CM", "Index", "Item")), 
               width = 0.4, outlier.shape = NA, fill = "white", size = 0.7, coef = 0) +
  geom_errorbar(data = filter(all_ci_data, Scale == "CMQ", Hypothesis == "H1"),
                aes(x = Node, ymin = lower, ymax = upper), 
                width = 0.15, color = "black", linewidth = 0.6, inherit.aes = FALSE) +
  facet_wrap(~ CountryName, ncol = 4) +
  scale_color_manual(values = node_colors) +
  labs(y = "Strength Centrality", tag = "A", title = "H1") +
  theme_masterpiece() +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold", hjust = 0.5, margin = margin(b = 10)))

# B
p2_s3 <- all_long_data %>% 
  filter(Scale == "CMQ", Hypothesis == "H2") %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = Node, y = Centrality)) +
  geom_boxplot(aes(color = ifelse(Node == "CB", "Index", "Item")), 
               width = 0.4, outlier.shape = NA, fill = "white", size = 0.7, coef = 0) +
  geom_errorbar(data = filter(all_ci_data, Scale == "CMQ", Hypothesis == "H2"),
                aes(x = Node, ymin = lower, ymax = upper), 
                width = 0.15, color = "black", linewidth = 0.6, inherit.aes = FALSE) +
  facet_wrap(~ CountryName, ncol = 4) +
  scale_color_manual(values = node_colors) +
  labs(y = "Strength Centrality", tag = "B", title = "H2") +
  theme_masterpiece() +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold", hjust = 0.5, margin = margin(b = 10)))

# Together
combined_s3 <- (p1_s3 / p2_s3) + 
  plot_layout(heights = c(1, 1)) & 
  theme(
    plot.tag = element_text(face = "bold", size = 20),
    axis.title.x = element_blank() 
  )

ggsave(
  here("Output", "Study3_Combined_Masterpiece_A4.png"), 
  plot = combined_s3, 
  width = 8.27, 
  height = 11.69, 
  units = "in", 
  dpi = 600
  )
```

### Analytical strategy plot

```{r}
# a figure explaining the logic behind our networks

# manage data as before
df_usa <- master_datasets[["Study1_SUSPECTS"]] %>% 
  filter(country == "USA") %>% 
  select(CM, CB, starts_with("cb_"), starts_with("cm_")) %>% 
  na.omit()

m0 <- huge.npn(as.matrix(df_usa %>% select(starts_with("cb_"), starts_with("cm_"))), verbose = FALSE)
m1 <- huge.npn(as.matrix(df_usa %>% select(CM, starts_with("cb_"))), verbose = FALSE)
m2 <- huge.npn(as.matrix(df_usa %>% select(CB, starts_with("cm_"))), verbose = FALSE)

# colors
cols_index <- "#702963"
cols_item  <- "#008080"

# function to plot networks
plot_usa_net_titled <- function(mat, labs, groups, title_text) {
  
  fit <- mgm(mat, type = rep("g", ncol(mat)), level = rep(1, ncol(mat)), 
             lambdaSel = "CV", ruleReg = "OR", verbose = FALSE)
  
  # qgraph
  qgraph(fit$pairwise$wadj, 
         layout = "spring", 
         labels = labs,
         groups = groups,
         color = c(cols_index, cols_item),
         edge.color = fit$pairwise$edgecolor,
         minimum = 0.03,      
         title = title_text,
         title.cex = 2.5,       
         vsize = 15,            
         label.cex = 1.1,       
         edge.width = 1,      
         trans = 0.8,           
         borders = TRUE, 
         border.width = 1.5,    
         legend = FALSE,        
         mar = c(5, 5, 8, 5))   
}

# Assembly
png(here("Output", "USA_Networks_Titled_Masterpiece.png"), 
    width = 8.27, height = 11.69, units = "in", res = 600,
    type = "cairo", bg = "#F9F9F7")

#  layout
par(mfrow = c(3, 1), family = "serif", font.main = 2)

#  H0
plot_usa_net_titled(m0, colnames(m0), 
                    list("CB" = which(startsWith(colnames(m0), "cb_")), 
                         "CM" = which(startsWith(colnames(m0), "cm_"))), 
                    "H0")

# H1
plot_usa_net_titled(m1, colnames(m1), 
                    list("Index" = 1, "Items" = 2:ncol(m1)), 
                    "H1")

# H2
plot_usa_net_titled(m2, colnames(m2), 
                    list("Index" = 1, "Items" = 2:ncol(m2)), 
                    "H2")

dev.off()
```
